transcript: Speaker A (Woman): મને English વાંચતા આવડે છે. English લખી પણ લઉં છું. [I know how to read English. I can write English too.] Speaker B (AI): What about speaking? Speaker A: થોડી-થોડી... light, light! [A little bit... light, light!] Speaker B: Do you get nervous to speak English? Speaker A: હા... [Yes...] Speaker B: Have you tried any courses? Speaker A: કોઈ ફાયદો નથી થયો. [No benefit came from them.] Speaker B: What about AI training? Speaker A: AI? Speaker B: Yup! An AI Teacher can make you speak English faster than any other resource. It's very useful. Speaker A: કેવી રીતે join કરીએ? [How do we join?] Speaker B: Install MySivi App. આ ARYA AI તમારા level પ્રમાણે તમને personalised training આપશે. જો તમે રોજ practice કરશો, તો તમે વિચાર્યું હશે એના કરતા પણ જલ્દી English બોલતા શીખી જશો. [Install MySivi App. This ARYA AI will give you personalised training according to your level. If you practice daily, you will learn to speak English even faster than you thought.] Speaker A: વિશ્વાસ જ નથી આવતો! [I just can't believe it!] Speaker B: 1 Crore+ learners આ appનો ઉપયોગ કરી રહ્યા છે. MySivi App join કરો અને તમારી AI Training શરૂ કરો. [1 Crore+ learners are using this app. Join MySivi App and start your AI Training.] Speaker C (Outro): Install Now પર ક્લિક કરો અને MySivi એપ ડાઉનલોડ કરો. [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]

summary: A woman shares her struggle with speaking English despite being able to read and write it. An AI assistant introduces her to MySivi, an AI-powered English learning app that offers personalized training. The ad highlights the app's large user base and encourages viewers to download it to start their training.
